header.label: MY JOURNEY
header.description:
Every ride is a story, every medal a milestone.
Here's a timeline of my journey on and off the bike.

blogs.label: FEATURED JOURNEY
blogs.title: Where the Roads Touch the
blogs.description: A solo ride through the Himalayan dreams.
fullStory: There are roads that don't just take you from one place to another, they take you somewhere within.
This ride was one such story — a solo escape into the Himalayas, where every turn revealed a new perspective, every climb tested my limits, and every descent felt like freedom.
From the quiet villages to the roaring rivers, from the thin air to the warm smiles, the Himalayas taught me more than I expected.
It wasn't just about the destination. It was about the journey.

quote.text: The mountains are calling and I must go.
quote.author: John Muir

blogs.title: Along the Arabian Sea Coast
blogs.description: Cycling along the turquoise waters of the Arabian Sea.

blogs.title: Monsoon Rides in the Western Ghats
blogs.description: Greenery and mist in the mountains during monsoon.

bottomQuote: EVERY RIDE. EVERY STORY. EVERY MILE.
